nasb.text: For a covenant is valid only when men are dead, for it is never in force while the one who made it lives.

esv.text: For a will takes effect only at death, since it is not in force as long as the one who made it is alive.

cnv.text: 因為人死了，遺囑才能確立，立遺囑的人還活著的時候，遺囑決不生效。

ccb.text: 如果立遗嘱的人依然健在，遗嘱就不能生效。

csbs.text: 事实上，人死了，遗嘱才能确立，因为立遗嘱之人活着的时候，遗嘱绝对不能生效。
